description: Phishing templates impersonating workplace collaboration platforms

templates.name: Slack Account Audit
suggested_subject_lines: Your Slack workspace access needs verification
templates.notes: Effective against daily Slack users. Admin impersonation + deadline is a high-click combo.

templates.name: Microsoft Teams Guest Access Request
suggested_subject_lines: Microsoft Teams: Guest access request requires your approval
Pending approval: External user requesting channel access
templates.notes: Auto-approve deadline is highly effective pressure tactic. Works well for mid-level managers.

templates.name: Zoom Cloud Recording Ready
suggested_subject_lines: Your cloud recording is now available
[Zoom] Meeting recording ready - expires in 7 days
templates.notes: Storage-full warning adds urgency. Meeting name personalization increases effectiveness.
